record.counterfactual: Keeping native PyGRC state and operations fixed while removing the RCAE configuration/orchestration layer makes the registered experiment inexpressible; it does not show that the underlying native surface or packet operations disappear
record.implementation_identity: p2_i1_runtime.py plus p2_i1_registration.py under rcae-p2-i1-registration-policy-v1; exact source digests are bound by the derived registration freeze
inputs: explicit deterministic seed and cell identity
cycle-scoped execution authorization when candidate execution begins
record.minimality: The adapter binds public PyGRC surfaces, constructs the frozen fixture, assigns declared inputs, schedules declared native operations, and records identities; it adds no alternate medium store, hidden state, fallback runtime, or automatic native substitution
record.necessity: PyGRC provides the native graph, packet, feedback-surface, snapshot, and producer-relevant operations but does not provide the P2-I1 cell matrix, ecology-side identities, control orchestration, or evidence records as one native experiment
record.observed_absence_or_tension: The desired niche-conditioning comparison is a new ecology-side composition of native operations, while the project must preserve exact provenance and prevent experiment code from becoming a silent LGRC extension
outputs: no mutation of the graph repository
record.proposed_graph_discriminator: Whether a future native LGRC surface can express the same feedback-conditioned later-opportunity relation with explicit lineage, withdrawal, and receipt semantics
record.scheduling_behavior: Fresh worker per attempt; fixed cell order; one W2 snapshot branch point; four independent restores; no cross-attempt mutable reset and no operation outside the profile or exact cycle freeze
record.state_behavior: All scientific carrier state remains in native PyGRC model state; RCAE retains only declarative inputs, orchestration-local values, and auditable output records
record.withdrawal_test: D-025 classifies adapter withdrawal as an implementation-conformance boundary, not the L01 constructed-scaffold causal control; if execution reveals RCAE-owned state carrying the medium or response, reopen registration and make AE01-L01-CTRL-05 applicable before proceeding
